quick_skim.title: An Adjoint-based Neural Regulator for Real-Time Optimal Control with State Constraints
quick_skim.abstract: This paper introduces a learning-based control framework for real-time constrained optimal control of nonlinear systems with safety guarantees based on the Pontryagin's Minimum Principle. The approach learns a neural co-state (adjoint) policy that encodes optimality through the system Hamiltonian, rather than directly approximating a control law. Feasibility is enforced separately at runtime through an efficient convex projection that incorporates actuator limits and safety constraints expressed as control barrier functions. We refer to this framework as an adjoint-based neural regulator (ANR) as it yields a controller that satisfies constraints while retaining the optimality structure encoded by the learned adjoint. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed framework on nonlinear constrained control tasks using a unicycle model. The ANR achieves performance at par with nonlinear model predictive control at more than two orders of magnitude lower computational cost, while exhibiting near-invariant performance across unseen scenarios, thus, significantly outperforming reinforcement learning methods in out-of-training-distribution regimes.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: Uses Pontryagin's Minimum Principle for real-time constrained optimal control, applicable to hybrid UAV energy management
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 使用庞特里亚金极小值原理进行实时约束最优控制，可应用于混合动力无人机能量管理
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 使用庞特里亚金极小值原理进行实时约束最优控制，可应用于混合动力无人机能量管理
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 使用庞特里亚金极小值原理进行实时约束最优控制，可应用于混合动力无人机能量管理
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a learning-based control framework that combines Pontryagin's Minimum Principle with a neural co-state policy and safety constraints for real-time optimal control, with demonstrated application in constrained systems.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对非线性系统实时约束最优控制问题，提出一种基于学习的控制框架。该方法利用庞特里亚金极小值原理学习神经协态策略以编码最优性，并结合控制屏障函数保证安全约束。仿真结果表明，该调节器能实现实时最优控制，并满足状态和输入约束，为混合动力无人机能量管理等应用提供了新方法。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对非线性系统实时约束最优控制问题，提出一种基于学习的控制框架。该方法利用庞特里亚金极小值原理学习神经协态策略以编码最优性，并结合控制屏障函数保证安全约束。仿真结果表明，该调节器能实现实时最优控制，并满足状态和输入约束，为混合动力无人机能量管理等应用提供了新方法。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: Papers central to 查找关于混合动力无人机和混合电推垂直起降飞行器能量管理策略的综述论文和代表性研究。重点关注串联混合动力无人机、燃料电池/电池混合动力无人机、内燃机-发电机/电池混合动力无人机和混合电推垂直起降飞行器。总结主要的能量管理方法，包括基于规则控制、模糊逻辑控制、等效消耗最小化策略、自适应等效消耗最小化策略、动态规划、庞特里亚金极小值原理、模型预测控制和强化学习。优先考虑讨论系统建模、基于任务剖面的功率分配、电池荷电状态维持控制、降低油耗、发电机瞬态抑制、电池老化、实时实现以及实验或硬件验证的论文。识别当前局限性和潜在研究空白，以支持混合动力无人机能量管理的未来创新。, especially work that connects or combines: UAV power management; fuel cell battery UAV; hybrid-electric propulsion; energy management strategy for hybrid electric unmanned aerial vehicles; | English keyword            | 中文含义       | | -------------------------- | ---------- | | hybrid-powered UAV         | 混合动力无人机    | | energy management strategy | 能量管理策略     | | hybrid-electric propulsion | 混合电推进      | | series hybrid UAV          | 串联混动无人机    | | fuel cell battery UAV      | 燃料电池/电池无人机 | | UAV power management       | 无人机功率管理    |; equivalent consumption minimization strategy for hybrid electric vehicles; Which papers provide a clear taxonomy of rule based, fuzzy, ECMS, dynamic programming, PMP, MPC, and reinforcement learning methods?; What are the unsolved problems in hybrid UAV energy management, such as SOC control, fuel consumption, generator transients, and mission adaptation?; What are the main categories of energy management strategies for hybrid powered UAVs?; What are the current limitations and research gaps in hybrid UAV energy management?.
